productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Kangroo Pocket Purple Tunics
description: Composition Blue, black and purple check top made of 100% cotton, with a round neck that has a full front buttoned placket and a collar button, drawcord below the bust, roll sleeves that are secured by buttoned flaps and has a curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Blend ethnicity and style with this cotton top from wrangler. With a wide round buttoned neck and a draw cord below the bust, this top gives you all the comfort to customize the Fit and suit your style statement. A must-have for those young girls who love those flowy lines, this top also looks great on would-be moms who love to flaunt that round belly. Team this with slim fit jeans or training pants and ballerina flats for a cool casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
